final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] interrupt_requests,
    input wire enable,
    output reg interrupt_active
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            interrupt_active <= 0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            interrupt_active <= |interrupt_requests; // Active if any request is asserted
        end
    end
endmodule
